name: Eric Zhu

find.name: Amadeo
find.why: You’ll really enjoy meeting Amadeo; he shares your passion for animation and illustration, and I think you both will have a lot to discuss.

find.name: Grant Howard
find.why: You should meet Grant Howard, as his innovative approach to creativity will inspire you and spark meaningful conversations about making people feel something true.
find.match_belief: Leaving silence for the listener's own memory to fill isn't lazy—it's trusting them with the truth they already know.

profile.belief: A blink, a shoulder drop—the smallest motions are where humans see themselves in fiction.
profile.working_on: animating a character whose facial microexpressions shift her entire emotional story second by second

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a deep understanding that the nuances of emotion reveal our shared humanity, making stories profoundly relatable and impactful.
